image:image.image:title: J. Worden & Sons asphalt paver laying hot-mix asphalt in Virginia
image:image.image:caption: Heavy asphalt paving machine laying fresh hot-mix asphalt at golden hour with steam rising from the surface

image:image.image:title: J. Worden & Sons Asphalt Paving — Virginia
image:image.image:caption: J. Worden & Sons Asphalt Paving — Virginia family-owned asphalt paving contractor

image:image.image:title: Houzz Awards — J. Worden & Sons
image:image.image:caption: Screenshot from houzz.com verifying J. Worden & Sons Paving has earned 3 Best of Houzz Service awards (2014, 2015, 2016) plus Houzz Recommended and 500 Saves badges.
